A.text: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside

parsed.answer_value: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside
parsed.rationale: The outer shell remains intact and expands as the red internal gas expands, indicating that the shell is flexible but does not rupture or dissolve.
